items.title: S01E01 - Viva Espana
items.summary: Comedy about two couples on holiday in Spain

infolabels.title: Viva Espana
infolabels.plot: Comedy about two couples on holiday in Spain

items.title: S01E02 - El Macho
items.summary: The two couples go to see a bullfight to see El Macho in action. David is fascinated, but the fight doesn't live up to his expectations. Then Amy decides to step into the ring on her own account.

infolabels.title: El Macho
infolabels.plot: The two couples go to see a bullfight to see El Macho in action. David is fascinated, but the fight doesn't live up to his expectations. Then Amy decides to step into the ring on her own account.

items.title: S01E03 - Praying Mantis
items.summary: David is carried away by the throb of guitars, the drone of the cicadas, the scent of the bougainvillea, but most of all by Linda.

infolabels.title: Praying Mantis
infolabels.plot: David is carried away by the throb of guitars, the drone of the cicadas, the scent of the bougainvillea, but most of all by Linda.

items.title: S01E04 - Spanish Lace
items.summary: The couples decide to take a trip into the mountains.

infolabels.title: Spanish Lace
infolabels.plot: The couples decide to take a trip into the mountains.

items.title: S01E05 - Bedroom Farce
items.summary: Amy's suspicions are further aroused by David and Linda's midnight swim. Robert also suspects that a romance is in the air.

infolabels.title: Bedroom Farce
infolabels.plot: Amy's suspicions are further aroused by David and Linda's midnight swim. Robert also suspects that a romance is in the air.

items.title: S01E06 - Forty Love
items.summary: Amy finally sees evidence of David and Linda's affair.

infolabels.title: Forty Love
infolabels.plot: Amy finally sees evidence of David and Linda's affair.

items.title: S01E07 - Hasta La Vista
items.summary: Linda and David decide to leave - together.

infolabels.title: Hasta La Vista
infolabels.plot: Linda and David decide to leave - together.

items.title: S02E01 - Manana
items.summary: David has been disowned by the other three and endeavours to smuggle himself past the police and out of the hotel dressed as a woman, with disastrous results.

infolabels.title: Manana
infolabels.plot: David has been disowned by the other three and endeavours to smuggle himself past the police and out of the hotel dressed as a woman, with disastrous results.

items.title: S02E02 - Casino
items.summary: David feels lucky, and despite their spending money running low, decides to visit the Casino. Concentration coolness and a strong nerve are called for as he pursues a sequence of winning numbers, but will he risk all on the flip of a coin?

infolabels.title: Casino
infolabels.plot: David feels lucky, and despite their spending money running low, decides to visit the Casino. Concentration coolness and a strong nerve are called for as he pursues a sequence of winning numbers, but will he risk all on the flip of a coin?

items.title: S02E03 - Couples
items.summary: A young couple arrive from England on their honeymoon. Romance is in the air, but unfortunately the dewy-eyed lovers manage to mix and match the wrong couples.

infolabels.title: Couples
infolabels.plot: A young couple arrive from England on their honeymoon. Romance is in the air, but unfortunately the dewy-eyed lovers manage to mix and match the wrong couples.

items.title: S02E04 - El Astro
items.summary: There is great excitement as Frazer Hines, the famous TV star, comes to stay at the hotel. Unfortunately, one of the ladies over-reacts and the husbands become over suspicious.

infolabels.title: El Astro
infolabels.plot: There is great excitement as Frazer Hines, the famous TV star, comes to stay at the hotel. Unfortunately, one of the ladies over-reacts and the husbands become over suspicious.

items.title: S02E05 - Pepe
items.summary: A day trip from Spain to Tangier by boat starts a mysterious chain of events. Having agreed to carry a parcel back into Spain, Amy fears she may be carrying illegal substances. Getting rid of the evidence proves difficult.

infolabels.title: Pepe
infolabels.plot: A day trip from Spain to Tangier by boat starts a mysterious chain of events. Having agreed to carry a parcel back into Spain, Amy fears she may be carrying illegal substances. Getting rid of the evidence proves difficult.

items.title: S02E06 - Snap
items.summary: David finds to his horror that it is a small world when he meets Kevin in the hotel. He has been dogged by Kevin all his life - at school; in the Army; and at the office. It was Kevin that was responsible for David's redundancy. Will David let this greasy toad get away with it all?

infolabels.title: Snap
infolabels.plot: David finds to his horror that it is a small world when he meets Kevin in the hotel. He has been dogged by Kevin all his life - at school; in the Army; and at the office. It was Kevin that was responsible for David's redundancy. Will David let this greasy toad get away with it all?

items.title: S02E07 - Adios
items.summary: All good things come to an end and this is the last day of the holiday. Packing bottles of booze, the last look round, and a visit to Pedro's, the local bar, all have to be done. Unfortunately, David and Linda's lingering farewells are rudely interrupted.

infolabels.title: Adios
infolabels.plot: All good things come to an end and this is the last day of the holiday. Packing bottles of booze, the last look round, and a visit to Pedro's, the local bar, all have to be done. Unfortunately, David and Linda's lingering farewells are rudely interrupted.

items.title: S03E01 - Winter Break
items.summary: Amy has found herself a job, but poor David is still unemployed and depressed. He decides he needs a break to get away from it all!

infolabels.title: Winter Break
infolabels.plot: Amy has found herself a job, but poor David is still unemployed and depressed. He decides he needs a break to get away from it all!

items.title: S03E02 - Deja Vu
items.summary: Amy has joined David for a week's holiday in Spain. She is suspicious, however, and does not trust him. Amy has the feeling that she has experienced the same situation before.

infolabels.title: Deja Vu
infolabels.plot: Amy has joined David for a week's holiday in Spain. She is suspicious, however, and does not trust him. Amy has the feeling that she has experienced the same situation before.

items.title: S03E03 - Close Up
items.summary: The TV cameras have arrived in the hotel. Judith Chalmers and a crew from the "Wish You Were Here...?" programme have flown over to make a report. The Pearces (David and Amy) and the Cochrans (Robert and Linda) are determined to get on the screen.

infolabels.title: Close Up
infolabels.plot: The TV cameras have arrived in the hotel. Judith Chalmers and a crew from the "Wish You Were Here...?" programme have flown over to make a report. The Pearces (David and Amy) and the Cochrans (Robert and Linda) are determined to get on the screen.

items.title: S03E04 - The Go-Between
items.summary: Neville becomes inextricably involved with David and Linda. Although keen to help, poor Neville manages to get everything wrong, including an encounter with a Chimpanzee.

infolabels.title: The Go-Between
infolabels.plot: Neville becomes inextricably involved with David and Linda. Although keen to help, poor Neville manages to get everything wrong, including an encounter with a Chimpanzee.

items.title: S03E05 - Costa Del Crime
items.summary: David discovers to his horror that he has mistakenly picked up someone else's tartan bag at the airport. What he and Amy find in the bag leads to a most unwelcome visit from the owners.

infolabels.title: Costa Del Crime
infolabels.plot: David discovers to his horror that he has mistakenly picked up someone else's tartan bag at the airport. What he and Amy find in the bag leads to a most unwelcome visit from the owners.

items.title: S03E06 - Cause Celebre
items.summary: Senor Garcia, the new manager at the hotel, makes some sweeping staff changes. Not only does this upset Carlos the Waiter but also the holidaymakers. Amy encourages Carlos to make a firm stand which turns out to be a politically wise move.

infolabels.title: Cause Celebre
infolabels.plot: Senor Garcia, the new manager at the hotel, makes some sweeping staff changes. Not only does this upset Carlos the Waiter but also the holidaymakers. Amy encourages Carlos to make a firm stand which turns out to be a politically wise move.

items.title: S03E07 - Party Night
items.summary: It's party night at the hotel. Everyone has to provide fancy dress and enter the talent contest. After much discussion The Pearces and the Cochrans surprise each other with their latent talent.

infolabels.title: Party Night
infolabels.plot: It's party night at the hotel. Everyone has to provide fancy dress and enter the talent contest. After much discussion The Pearces and the Cochrans surprise each other with their latent talent.

items.title: S03E08 - A Duty Free Christmas
items.summary: We don't have an overview translated in English. Help us expand our database by adding one.

infolabels.title: A Duty Free Christmas
infolabels.plot: We don't have an overview translated in English. Help us expand our database by adding one.
